scripts.typecheck: tsc -p shared/tsconfig.json && tsc -p backend/tsconfig.json && tsc -p client/tsconfig.json && tsc -p news/tsconfig.json
scripts.gate: npm run docs:check && npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.infra:up: docker compose -f .coder/postgres/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f .coder/minio/docker-compose.yml up -d && docker compose -f .coder/grafana/docker-compose.yml up -d
scripts.infra:down: docker compose -f .coder/postgres/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f .coder/minio/docker-compose.yml down && docker compose -f .coder/grafana/docker-compose.yml down
